mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_NO, MEMBER_NO, BOARD_CODE, CATEGORY_CODE, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, READ_COUNT, CREATE_DATE, BOARD_ACTIVE ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{memberNo}, #{boardCode}, NULLIF(#{categoryCode}, 0), #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, 0, SYSDATE, 'Y' )
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, B.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, B.BOARD_CODE AS boardCode, B.CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode, BC.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, B.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, B.READ_COUNT AS readCount, B.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, B.BOARD_ACTIVE AS boardActive, M.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, NVL(L.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS likeCount FROM BOARD B JOIN MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN BOARD_CATEGORY BC ON B.CATEGORY_CODE = BC.CATEGORY_CODE AND B.BOARD_CODE = BC.BOARD_CODE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BOARD_NO, COUNT(*) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE LIKE_TYPE = 'L' GROUP BY BOARD_NO ) L ON B.BOARD_NO = L.BOARD_NO WHERE B.BOARD_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND M.MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY NVL(L.LIKE_COUNT, 0) DESC, B.READ_COUNT DESC, B.CREATE_DATE DESC, B.BOARD_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM < 6

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, B.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, B.BOARD_CODE AS boardCode, B.CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode, BC.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, B.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, B.READ_COUNT AS readCount, B.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, B.BOARD_ACTIVE AS boardActive, M.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, NVL(L.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS likeCount FROM BOARD B JOIN MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN BOARD_CATEGORY BC ON B.CATEGORY_CODE = BC.CATEGORY_CODE AND B.BOARD_CODE = BC.BOARD_CODE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BOARD_NO, COUNT(*) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE LIKE_TYPE = 'L' GROUP BY BOARD_NO ) L ON B.BOARD_NO = L.BOARD_NO WHERE B.BOARD_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND M.MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY B.CREATE_DATE DESC, B.BOARD_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM < 6

SELECT B.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, B.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, B.BOARD_CODE AS boardCode, B.CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode, B.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, B.READ_COUNT AS readCount, B.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, B.BOARD_ACTIVE AS boardActive, M.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, BC.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, NVL(L.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS likeCount, I.THUMBNAIL_PATH AS thumbnailPath FROM BOARD B JOIN MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN BOARD_CATEGORY BC ON B.CATEGORY_CODE = BC.CATEGORY_CODE AND B.BOARD_CODE = BC.BOARD_CODE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BOARD_NO, COUNT(*) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE LIKE_TYPE = 'L' GROUP BY BOARD_NO ) L ON B.BOARD_NO = L.BOARD_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BOARD_NO, MIN(FILE_PATH || CHANGE_NAME) AS THUMBNAIL_PATH FROM BOARD_IMG WHERE FILE_LEVEL = 1 GROUP BY BOARD_NO ) I ON B.BOARD_NO = I.BOARD_NO WHERE B.BOARD_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_CODE = #{boardCode} ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC

SELECT B.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, B.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, B.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, M.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.READ_COUNT AS readCount, B.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, B.BOARD_ACTIVE AS boardActive, B.BOARD_CODE AS boardCode, B.CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode, BC.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, NVL(L.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS likeCount FROM BOARD B JOIN MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN BOARD_CATEGORY BC ON B.CATEGORY_CODE = BC.CATEGORY_CODE AND B.BOARD_CODE = BC.BOARD_CODE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BOARD_NO, COUNT(*) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE LIKE_TYPE = 'L' GROUP BY BOARD_NO ) L ON B.BOARD_NO = L.BOARD_NO WHERE B.BOARD_CODE = #{boardCode} AND B.BOARD_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND M.MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY B.CREATE_DATE DESC, B.BOARD_NO DESC

SELECT B.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, B.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, B.BOARD_CODE AS boardCode, B.CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode, B.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, B.READ_COUNT AS readCount, B.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, B.BOARD_ACTIVE AS boardActive, M.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, BC.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, NVL(L.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS likeCount FROM BOARD B JOIN MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN BOARD_CATEGORY BC ON B.CATEGORY_CODE = BC.CATEGORY_CODE AND B.BOARD_CODE = BC.BOARD_CODE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BOARD_NO, COUNT(*) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE LIKE_TYPE = 'L' GROUP BY BOARD_NO ) L ON B.BOARD_NO = L.BOARD_NO WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.BOARD_ACTIVE = 'Y'

SELECT IMG_NO AS imgNo, BOARD_NO AS boardNo, ORIGIN_NAME AS originName, CHANGE_NAME AS changeName, FILE_PATH AS filePath, FILE_LEVEL AS fileLevel, UPLOAD_DATE AS uploadDate FROM BOARD_IMG WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} ORDER BY FILE_LEVEL ASC, IMG_NO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_IMG ( IMG_NO, BOARD_NO, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_LEVEL, UPLOAD_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD_IMG_NO.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{originName}, #{changeName}, #{filePath}, #{fileLevel}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET READ_COUNT = READ_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND BOARD_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = 'L'

SELECT C.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, C.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, C.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, M.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, C.COMMENT_CONTENT AS commentContent, C.COMMENT_REG_DATE AS commentRegDate, C.COMMENT_ACTIVE_YN AS commentActiveYn FROM BOARD_COMMENT C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE C.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND C.COMMENT_ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.COMMENT_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_COMMENT ( COMMENT_ID, BOARD_NO, MEMBER_NO, COMMENT_CONTENT, COMMENT_REG_DATE, COMMENT_ACTIVE_YN ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD_COMMENT.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{memberNo}, #{commentContent}, SYSDATE, 'Y' )

INSERT INTO COMMENT_REPORT ( REPORT_ID, REPORTER_MEMBER_NO, COMMENT_ID, REPORT_TYPE_ID, REPORT_REASON, REPORT_DATE, REPORT_PROCESS_YN ) VALUES ( SEQ_COMMENT_REPORT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{reporterMemberNo}, #{commentId}, 1, '댓글 신고', SYSDATE, 'N' )
